Scripts.OnLoad:
local tl = self:CreateTexture(nil, "BORDER") tl:SetAtlas("mock-corner-tl") tl:SetSize(32, 32) tl:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self, "TOPLEFT", 0, 0)
local tr = self:CreateTexture(nil, "BORDER") tr:SetAtlas("mock-corner-tr", true) tr:SetSize(48, 48) tr:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", self, "TOPRIGHT", 0, 0)
